shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "product catalog admin caching sync server action" --space "default"'

/bin/bash -lc "nmem --json m add \"Admin catalog page uses Next cache components with the products cache tag. The page reads product data through a 'use cache' function tagged with products, and the inline Server Action queues background ERP/PIM sync work with after(); when the job finishes it calls revalidateTag('products', 'max') so catalog views stay responsive and converge shortly after sync completion.\" -t \"Catalog sync cache strategy\" --unit-type decision -l \"nextjs,catalog,caching\" -s codex -i 0.84"
